correctness.torch: PARTIAL_B1_ONLY — only B=1 tested; B=2..64 missing
correctness.ascendc: HOST_PRECOMPUTE_FALLBACK — identity copy kernel, real work on CPU
correctness.pypto: PARTIAL — per-row expand_clone exists but correctness not run

ascendc_implementation_note: Ascend C kernel is an identity copy after host precompute. NOT a true device-side implementation. Host does the actual broadcast expansion.
pypto_note: 29400 us = host dispatch overhead (per-row) not kernel compute. Actual kernel latency unknown without msprof.
overall_note: Correctness NOT RUN for any implementation beyond torch B=1. Profiler NOT RUN. Ascend C is host precompute fallback. Status is INCOMPLETE — previous COMPLETE claim was erroneous.
